visual_description:
A medium shot shows Ross and Monica sitting side-by-side on a light-colored couch in a cozy living room. Ross, on the left, wears a dark blue t-shirt and khaki pants. He looks down and to his left with a concerned expression. Monica, in a white top and blue pants, sits with her hands clasped, looking forward with a serious, slightly worried look. In the background, another person in a dark shirt and jeans stands with their hands on the back of the couch. The room is filled with furniture, including a side table and a lamp. The audio features a conversation between a man and a woman, punctuated by a laugh track. A man speaks in a calm, slightly concerned tone, asking, "Who has night vision goggles?" His question is immediately followed by a wave of audience laughter.

The camera cuts to a medium close-up of Phoebe, who is standing and speaking. She has long blonde hair and is wearing a patterned blouse. She gestures with her hands as she talks, looking off-camera. Behind her is a wooden cabinet with a television on top and some decorative items. A woman then responds with a high-pitched, incredulous voice, filled with disbelief and a hint of exasperation. "What?
